entities.name: Careerspan

entities.name: Full-database matching
entities.context: Powerful but expensive approach (~$20 per full role sweep across hundreds-thousands of candidates)

entities.name: Quick vibe check scans
entities.context: Cheaper, more scalable layer for already-onboarded candidates (cents per check)

entities.name: Careerspan-hosted job board
entities.context: Simple job board that candidates revisit, with richer per-role analysis on application

entities.name: Incentive alignment
entities.context: Economic principle where it costs Careerspan more to surface unqualified people, motivating quality filtering

relationships.context: Cheaper alternative to full database sweeps
Economic structure inherently motivates quality filtering
